mnemonics.title: Six Operator Requirements
mnemonics.content: SETSCQ: Scalability, Energy efficiency, Traffic control, Security, Cost-effectiveness, Quality of service. Remember: 'Smart Engineers Take Secure Cheap Quality' networks.

mnemonics.title: LPWAN Technologies
mnemonics.content: NLS: NB-IoT, LTE-M, Sigfox/LoRaWAN. These are the three main LPWAN technologies operators use for massive IoT connectivity.

mnemonics.title: Power Saving Mechanisms
mnemonics.content: PE: PSM (Power Saving Mode) = deep sleep after sending. eDRX (extended Discontinuous Reception) = extended listening intervals. Both extend battery life to 10+ years.

mnemonics.title: Security Technologies
mnemonics.content: eSIM + TLS + Secure Boot = the security triple for IoT devices. Authentication, Encryption, and Trusted boot form the operator's security foundation.
